title: The full derived-artifact chain, the step PAT37 has caught four times
action: Per D18 and critical pattern PAT37 (recurred 4 times: a derived artifact regenerated after the cell that should have owned it). Run the complete chain in order and commit its output: (1) mirror copy — confirm every edited templates/lib/ and hooks/ file matches its .bee/bin/ target, and that .bee/bin/bee.mjs matches skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs (which scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs does NOT check); (2) plugin tree render — `node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs`; (3) release manifest write, per whatever the repo's manifest step is (find it; PAT37 names it as part of the chain); (4) self-onboard — `node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply` so .bee/onboarding.json's per-file sha256 entries are current, including :43, :44 and :48 which cover the three hooks this feature edited. Then run the FULL verify and report its output verbatim.

truths: The full verify suite is green, with its output recorded — not asserted.
A fresh onboarding dry-run reports no drift.
Every derived artifact in the PAT37 chain has been regenerated, not just the two named in D18.
artifacts: Refreshed mirrors, plugin trees, release manifest and onboarding hash ledger
prohibitions: Never hand-edit .bee/onboarding.json hashes — run the onboarding apply.
Do not cap this cell on a partial verify; the whole suite is the proof.

trace.dropped_reason: Slice 1 re-shaped after validation returned NOT READY (6 blocking findings). Superseded by the D19-D22 shape: hook keeps anchor ownership, per-cell manifest+ledger regen, serial chain, split cells.
